case_title: SANTIZO, DORA vs. BATISTE, EUGENE ANTHONY et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SANTIZO, DORA AS TO DEFENDANT BATISTE, EUGENE ANTHONY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO DOES 1 TO 50 SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          JAN-06-1994 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  NOV-08-1993 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       DEC-17-1993
